patch.value: Immediate-breaking scope: remove none/null sentinel semantics in mutations, filters, help/completion/contracts, wrapper, docs, and tests. Replacement: explicit clear/unassigned flags and strict create quality behavior.
Remove none token semantics across command surfaces
Replace none/null sentinel semantics with explicit clear and unassigned filters across all command paths, with strict required-create meaningful-value enforcement.

All none/null token usages are removed from command semantics; explicit clear/unassigned flags are available; strict create required options reject clear directives; docs/tests/contracts/wrapper are aligned.
